steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: There was a war. There is always a war, in the old stories.

steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: Four crowns came out of it. None of them came out alive -- not in the way that matters.

steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: The marks on the boundary-stones of the Iron Vein are getting shorter.

steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: And in a village called Raven Hollow, the ground is warm where it should not be.

steps.speaker: The Chronicler
steps.line: That is where you come in. It is where everyone comes in, sooner or later.

steps.speaker: The Warden of the Wells
steps.line: You come to the Copper Wells with clean hands. It will not last.

steps.speaker: The Warden of the Wells
steps.line: The inscription is live now. Every stone here is listening.

steps.speaker: Pit-Caller Drego
steps.line: Gravemark Tundra. Ten thousand torches, and above us -- nothing at all.

steps.speaker: Pit-Caller Drego
steps.line: Vampire, werewolf, the dead, and the last human throne. Four banners, one night.

steps.speaker: Pit-Caller Drego
steps.line: The old name is cursed. So the soldiers call it the Second Cooperation, and nobody says it twice.

steps.speaker: Pit-Caller Drego
steps.line: The Convergence walks north to the Grave. We are the wall. Hold the line.

steps.speaker: Pit-Caller Drego
steps.line: The door stands open. Not breached -- open. She spent them all at once.

steps.speaker: Pit-Caller Drego
steps.line: We hold it open behind you. That was the whole point of tonight. Go down.
